relations.note: Usage guidance builds on the wave construction rule.

quotes: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Preserve the signature layered, translucent wave device and approved palette.
rules.rule_text: Wave graphics come in two approved colorways (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each in long and short variants. Construction always layers a top wave at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7) over the base wave — Gold over Sunshine, Sky Blue over Deep Blue — and must always preserve the layered, translucent quality. Only approved color values may be used.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth.

rules.intent: Clarify approved placement and function of the wave device.
rules.rule_text: Wave forms may be used alone or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Mandate the approved masthead copy-holding device.
rules.rule_text: The Masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → light gold #ffe05c / 0C,10M,78Y,0K, with the logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
